name: Cliff's Check Cashing #37
description_short: Multi-location check cashing service offering payroll, tax refund, and personal checks plus personal installment loans up to $1,760, prepaid cards, and money transfer services.
description_long:
Cliff's Check Cashing operates multiple locations across Texas, with '#37' being one franchised outlet in their network. The company positions itself as a financial services alternative to traditional banks, focusing on underserved communities that need fast access to cash and basic financial services. Founded on the principle of 'improving your financial livelihood,' Cliff's has built a reputation for customer service and accessibility.

The company's primary service is check cashing across multiple check types: payroll, tax refund, traveler's checks, two-party checks, worker's compensation, government, cashier's checks, lawsuit settlement checks, business checks, and insurance checks. Beyond check cashing, Cliff's offers personal installment loans ranging from $100 to $1,760, positioning these as alternatives to high-interest short-term loans. They also provide Netspend prepaid debit cards (no credit check, no minimum balance, no late fees), MoneyGram money transfer services, and various ancillary services including ATM access, bill and utility payments, money orders up to $1,000, mailbox rental, faxing, prepaid wireless pins, US postage stamps, and Texas Lottery ticket sales.

Cliff's differentiates itself through convenience features including online check upload functionality to save time, a High Volume Customer Club for frequent users, first-time customer coupons, and multilingual support (English and Spanish). The company emphasizes friendly, professional staff and quick service lines based on customer testimonials. All locations maintain consistent products and services, suggesting standardized operations across the franchise network.

As a check-cashing and installment loan provider, Cliff's serves primarily unbanked and underbanked populations seeking alternatives to traditional banking services. While the company offers legitimate financial services with positive customer reviews, the nature of check-cashing businesses inherently involves fees on transactions and the installment loans, while better than payday alternatives, still represent higher-cost borrowing compared to traditional bank loans.
pros: Accepts wide variety of check types including two-party, cashier's, insurance, and lawsuit settlement checks that banks often refuse
Personal installment loans up to $1,760 positioned as lower-interest alternative to short-term payday loans
Online check upload feature allows customers to initiate cashing process remotely, saving time in-person
Netspend prepaid card requires no credit check and has no minimum balance or late fees
High Volume Customer Club provides additional savings for frequent customers
Multilingual support (English/Spanish) and extended hours (open on holidays like MLK Jr. Day when banks close)
Consistently positive customer reviews highlighting friendly, professional staff and quick service
cons: Check cashing fees are charged on transactions, though website describes them as 'ridiculously low' per one review, specific rates not disclosed
Personal installment loans still represent higher-cost borrowing compared to traditional bank loans or credit union PALs
Prepaid card has associated costs, terms, and conditions per cardholder agreement, not fully transparent on website
Limited to Texas locations only, not a nationwide service
Installment loan maximum of $1,760 insufficient for larger financial needs
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals needing fast check cashing on weekends/holidays when banks are closed
Small business owners needing to cash business-related checks outside traditional banking channels
Customers with two-party or non-standard checks that banks refuse to process
Frequent users of check cashing and bill payment services who can benefit from High Volume Customer Club discounts
diagnosis: Cliff's Check Cashing #37 is best for Texas residents who are underbanked or need check cashing services outside standard banking hours, particularly those with non-standard check types. The main caveat is that while fees are reportedly competitive, check cashing and installment loans remain higher-cost financial services compared to traditional banking alternatives, suitable primarily for those without bank access rather than as a preferred financial choice.
services: MoneyGram money transfer and wire services
